task_description: Complete pipeline wiring with input validation and end-to-end flow. Add a ValidateInput Choice state to the Step Functions state machine that checks file extensions, enhance the Lambda with field/extension validation, wire the complete end-to-end success and failure paths, and update ARCHITECTURE.md.

verification.summary: All 45 tests pass (37 existing + 8 new). Build succeeds with no warnings. CDK synth produces valid CloudFormation. Tests verify actual synthesized template content (Choice state, file extensions, ValidationFailed Pass state, chain ordering, IAM roles) and would fail if implementation were reverted. Semantic review APPROVED on v2.
